title: Expand pre-populated car listings to 50+ realistic second-hand car listings

requirements.text: Expand the pre-populated sample car listings in `backend/main.mo` to at least 50 realistic second-hand car listings inspired by the types of cars listed on CarDekho, CarWale, and Spinny. Listings must cover a wide variety of: makes (Maruti Suzuki, Hyundai, Tata, Kia, Honda, Toyota, Mahindra, Renault, Skoda, Volkswagen, MG, Ford, Nissan, Jeep), models (Swift, Dzire, Baleno, Brezza, WagonR, Ertiga, Creta, i20, i10, Verna, Venue, Nexon, Punch, Harrier, Altroz, Seltos, Sonet, Carnival, City, Amaze, Fortuner, Innova Crysta, Urban Cruiser, Scorpio, XUV700, XUV300, Bolero, Kwid, Duster, Rapid, Octavia, Polo, Hector, Kicks, Compass), years (2015–2023), fuel types (Petrol, Diesel, CNG, Electric), transmissions (Manual, Automatic), colors, mileage ranges (5,000–150,000 km), asking prices (₹2.0L–₹22L), cities across India (Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune, Kolkata, Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Lucknow, Chandigarh, Surat, Bhopal, Nagpur, Kochi). Each listing must include all required fields: id, make, model, year, mileage, fuelType, transmission, color, city, askingPrice, sellerName, sellerPhone, description, registrationNumber, postedAt, status (mix of 'available' and 'sold'), bookingStatus ('none'), imageUrls (array with at least one high-quality car photo URL from Unsplash or similar), exteriorImages360 (array of at least 8 sequential angle image URLs), and interiorImages360 (array of at least 8 sequential angle image URLs).
acceptanceCriteria: The backend contains at least 50 pre-populated car listings visible after deployment.
Listings span at least 10 different car makes.
Listings span at least 15 different cities across India.
Listings include a mix of fuel types: Petrol, Diesel, CNG, and at least one Electric.
Listings include both Manual and Automatic transmissions.
Listings include a mix of 'available' and 'sold' statuses.
Every listing has a non-empty imageUrls array with at least one URL.
Every listing has non-empty exteriorImages360 and interiorImages360 arrays with at least 8 URLs each.
All listings are returned by the `getAllListings` backend query.
The Home page featured listings grid and the Listings browse page display listings correctly after deployment.

constraints: Do not scrape or copy real data from CarDekho, CarWale, or Spinny — use realistic but fictional/sample data inspired by those platforms.
All new listings must conform to the existing CarListing data model in backend/main.mo — do not change the data model schema.
Do not modify any frontend immutable paths.
nonGoals: Live API integration with CarDekho, CarWale, or Spinny.
Any changes to the frontend UI or components.
Any changes to the backend data model or query functions.
